info.title: Action Network API
info.description: The Action Network API provides access to the OSDI-based Action Network platform for progressive organizing. Manage people, petitions, events, fundraising, tags, and more.

post.summary: Create or update a person via signup helper
post.description: Creates a new person or updates an existing one (matched by email). Can also subscribe/unsubscribe and add tags.
